title: Christmas Elf Golem
description: Changes copper golems into Christmas elves!
body: I created this texture pack to turn copper golems into elves! I have tested it in my world that runs alongside iris, sodium, and the complementary unbound shader pack. So far no problems, but if you encounter any issues, let me know! -- At the moment, there is only one style of elf, and it stays the same for each oxidation stage.(This is my first ever pack c:) ~Randihope
